body.title: Extend audit-ticket (formerly /review filing-time) — validation/remediation/observability
body.result: Created ~/.claude/skills/audit-ticket/SKILL.md: inherits /review + 7 new checks (validation steps, remediation, rollback for HIGH-inertia, logging requirements, observability assertion, split test, audit-emphasis tag). Model: Haiku.
body.description:
audit-ticket inherits all current /review filing-time checks. Add: validation steps (how do we observe success in runtime, not just unit tests); validation remediation (cleanup steps after tests — DB rows, fixtures, file artifacts, log noise); rollback plan (HIGH-inertia only); logging requirements (try/except logs, silent-return-False / fanout=0 sites WARN with surrounding state); observability assertion ('if this breaks in prod, this log line points at it'); split test (size > S + ≥2 distinct verbs in check_body → propose split + AMEND); audit-emphasis tag (ticket can declare 'needs deep audit-smell' / 'doc-only, skip').

Emits per-run record.

Model: Haiku (declarative checks).

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/audit-ticket/SKILL.md, palace check shapes in theigors/rules/ticket_design_checks/*.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry.
**Test plan:** draft a ticket missing validation-remediation → AMEND. Draft an XL ticket with 4 verbs → SPLIT. Telemetry recorded.
